headline: Tanger Q1 Net Income Climbs on Record Leasing Amid Demand Surge
summary: By Karen Roman Tanger Inc. (NYSE: SKT) said first quarter net income was $0.24 per share, or $28.1 million vs. $0.17 per share, or $19 million the year prior. The company achieved 651 leasing deals for 3.4 million sq. ft. compared to 2.5 million sq. ft. the previous year, and a $482 average for tenant […]

headline: FRT Q1 FFO Tops Estimates on Record Leasing, POI Growth
summary: FRT beats Q1 estimates as leasing strength and rent growth lift revenues, while management raises the 2026 outlook.

raw.headline: FRT Q1 FFO Tops Estimates on Record Leasing, POI Growth

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Kimco Realty, Raises Price Target to $25
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Kimco Realty (NYSE:KIM) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $24 to $25.
